prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科组最低位次约37070→36914→34531→23300→27396。2021-2023年含闽台合作/地矿类特殊类型招生，位次较高；2024年起新高考物理类仅统计普通类，位次大幅前移至23300名；2025年回落至27396名，后移约4096名；2021-2025年计划数分别为173、151、175、169、167人，整体呈小幅缩减趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，以工科见长。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次27396名、近年位次波动较大（2024年因新高考改革位次异常前移后2025年明显回落后移），以及招生计划整体小幅缩减趋势，预计2026年位次在2025年基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约27596名，区间27096-28096名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 37070 → 36914 → 34531 → 23300 → 27396. From 2021 to 2023, it included special enrollment types such as Fujian-Taiwan Cooperation and Geology/Mineral categories, with higher rankings; starting from 2024, the new Gaokao Physics Category only counts regular categories, causing the ranking to significantly advance to 23300; in 2025, it fell back to 27396, moving backward by about 4096 positions; enrollment numbers from 2021 to 2025 were 173, 151, 175, 169, and 167 respectively, showing a slight overall decreasing trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, known for its strength in engineering.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 27396, significant fluctuations in recent years (the ranking abnormally advanced in 2024 due to the new Gaokao reform and then clearly fell back in 2025), and the overall slight decreasing trend in enrollment plans, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will continue to slightly fall back from the 2025 level; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 27596, with a range of 27096 to 28096.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: It is recommended that candidates, based on their own rankings and considering Fuzhou University's 211/Double First-Class level and engineering advantages, focus on Tier 2 majors within the predicted range, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 1876 → 1863 → 2184 → 2856 → 2942. It remained stable around 1860 in 2021-2022, but has been declining since 2023, with a cumulative decline of about 1079 positions over the past 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2942. The planned enrollment numbers from 2021 to 2025 were 19, 17, 17, 16, and 16 respectively, showing a slight overall reduction trend.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2942, the continuous decline trend in recent years (over 1000 positions decline in the past 3 years), and the slight reduction in enrollment plans, it is expected that the ranking will continue to decline slightly in 2026. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3022, with a range of 2522 to 3522.
